action.content: Write a song about innovation with a positive tone that is appealing to teenagers. Put your entire response in double quotation marks.
action.label: context

action.content:
"Verse 1:
We’re coding late, the city sleeps,
But our minds are wide awake.
A glitch in the system, a spark in the dark,
We turn the error into an arc.
No old rules, no ceiling, just us,
Building a future from dust.
The screen glows bright, the beat drops low,
Watch the new world start to grow.

Chorus:
Innovation’s the fire, we’re the spark,
Turning the dark into a mark.
Teenage dreams, electric and loud,
We’re breaking the mold, we’re breaking the cloud.
Yeah, we’re the glitch that fixes the code,
A fresh start, a brand new road.
Innovation’s the fire, we’re the spark,
The future’s ours, no looking back!

Verse 2:
From garage hacks to global streams,
We’re planting seeds of digital dreams.
No “you can’t,” no “not yet,” just “let’s try,”
With a laugh and a “why not?” in the sky.
Our voices rise, our ideas bloom,
Chasing the light in every room.
The old ways fade, the new ways shine,
We’re the pulse, we’re the design.

Chorus:
Innovation’s the fire, we’re the spark,
Turning the dark into a mark.
Teenage dreams, electric and loud,
We’re breaking the mold, we’re breaking the cloud.
Yeah, we’re the glitch that fixes the code,
A fresh start, a brand new road.
Innovation’s the fire, we’re the spark,
The future’s ours, no looking back!

Bridge:
It’s not about perfection, it’s about the try,
The stumble, the rise, the “what if?” in the eye.
So grab your tools, your apps, your dreams,
Let’s make the world a little more than it seems.
One step, one line, one bold new sound,
We’re the change, we’re the ground!

Outro:
Innovation’s the fire, we’re the spark,
Turning the dark into a mark.
Teenage dreams, electric and loud,
We’re breaking the mold, we’re breaking the cloud.
Yeah, we’re the glitch that fixes the code,
A fresh start, a brand new road.
Innovation’s the fire, we’re the spark,
The future’s ours, no looking back!"
action.label: response
